question: What are high-demand careers in Technology?
answer: In Technology, high-demand careers include: Software Engineer (₹₹5L – ₹50L, Demand: Very High), Data Scientist (₹₹8L – ₹45L, Demand: Very High), AI / ML Engineer (₹₹12L – ₹65L, Demand: Very High), Cybersecurity Analyst (₹₹6L – ₹35L, Demand: Very High), Cloud Architect (₹₹15L – ₹60L, Demand: Very High)
